tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.createBundle
tools.description: Create a new Bundle.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.createBundleCopy
tools.description: Creates a new copy of a Bundle. It will internally create copies of all the bundle items (identities and documents) of the original bundle

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.createEndUser
tools.description: Create a new End User.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.createEvaluation
tools.description: Creates an evaluation for a bundle

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.createItemAssignment
tools.description: Create a new Assigned Item.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.createReplaceItems
tools.description: Replaces all bundle items in the target bundle (specified in the path) with all the bundle items of the source bundle (specified by the from_bundle_sid body param)

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.createSupportingDocument
tools.description: Create a new Supporting Document.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.deleteBundle
tools.description: Delete a specific Bundle.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.deleteEndUser
tools.description: Delete a specific End User.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.deleteItemAssignment
tools.description: Remove an Assignment Item Instance.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.deleteSupportingDocument
tools.description: Delete a specific Supporting Document.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.fetchBundle
tools.description: Fetch a specific Bundle instance.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.fetchEndUser
tools.description: Fetch specific End User Instance.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.fetchEndUserType
tools.description: Fetch a specific End-User Type Instance.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.fetchEvaluation
tools.description: Fetch specific Evaluation Instance.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.fetchItemAssignment
tools.description: Fetch specific Assigned Item Instance.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.fetchRegulation
tools.description: Fetch specific Regulation Instance.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.fetchSupportingDocument
tools.description: Fetch specific Supporting Document Instance.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.fetchSupportingDocumentType
tools.description: Fetch a specific Supporting Document Type Instance.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.listBundle
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Bundles for an account.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.listBundleCopy
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Bundles Copies for a Bundle.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.listEndUser
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all End User for an account.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.listEndUserType
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all End-User Types.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.listEvaluation
tools.description: Retrieve a list of Evaluations associated to the Bundle resource.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.listItemAssignment
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Assigned Items for an account.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.listRegulation
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Regulations.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.listSupportingDocument
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Supporting Document for an account.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.listSupportingDocumentType
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all Supporting Document Types.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.updateBundle
tools.description: Updates a Bundle in an account.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.updateEndUser
tools.description: Update an existing End User.

tools.name: regulatoryCompliance.updateSupportingDocument
tools.description: Update an existing Supporting Document.

tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source
